en_title: Black Lake Horror Game Announced for PC
cn_title: 海上孤儿院恐怖游戏《Black Lake》公布
subtitle: 失踪者仍在墙中

paragraphs.en: First-person horror games are some of our favorite kind, as they bring the scary stuff right in front of your character's eyes. In Black Lake, developer Polydin Studio ups that ante by setting this spooky psychological/survival horror game not just in an abandoned orphanage in search of your missing twin sister, but one that's abandoned and floating at sea. It's in development for PC and consoles, with the PC version due out in Winter 2027 and the console versions expected to follow in mid-2027. Check out the first trailer above and the first screenshots in the gallery below.
paragraphs.cn: 第一人称恐怖游戏是我们最喜欢的类型之一，因为恐怖事物会直接呈现在角色眼前。在《Black Lake》中，开发商Polydin Studio进一步加码：这款心理与生存恐怖游戏不仅让玩家在废弃孤儿院寻找失踪的双胞胎妹妹，孤儿院本身还漂浮在海上。游戏正面向PC和主机开发，PC版预计2027年冬季推出，主机版预计随后于2027年年中发售。你可以观看上方首支预告片，并在下方图库查看首批截图。

paragraphs.en: Polydin describes the story setup as follows: "You play as Elena, who returns to the place where she grew up after receiving a message from her missing twin sister, Rita. The orphanage should have been empty. Instead, its halls are still warm, the bells are ringing again, and something has been moving through the walls. As Elena follows Rita’s trail, she uncovers the remains of a forbidden ritual tied to the children who vanished from the orphanage years ago. Some of them may still be here, though not in any form she remembers."
paragraphs.cn: Polydin这样介绍故事背景：「你将扮演Elena。她收到失踪的双胞胎妹妹Rita发来的消息后，回到自己长大的地方。孤儿院本应空无一人，但走廊仍有余温，铃声再次响起，还有某种东西在墙壁中穿行。Elena循着Rita留下的踪迹，发现了一场与多年前从孤儿院失踪的孩子有关的禁忌仪式遗迹。其中一些孩子或许仍在这里，只是已不再是她记忆中的模样。」

paragraphs.en: You'll utilize tools like your phone, candles, and lantern to stay alive, with light being particularly crucial. The developers note that "some creatures fear the scent of burning wax," so have fun with that one! You'll encounter plenty of puzzles along the way that are centered around rituals, utilizing objects in the environment. The endless black ocean surrounds you, your weapons will be limited, and in a particularly terrifying twist, Polydin says you'll need to "hide, distract, evade, and survive terrifying creatures formed from the orphanage’s missing children and staff." Peachy!
paragraphs.cn: 你需要利用手机、蜡烛和灯笼等工具求生，其中光线尤其关键。开发者指出，「有些生物害怕燃烧蜡烛的气味」，祝你玩得开心！途中还会遇到大量围绕仪式设计的谜题，需要利用环境中的物品解开。无尽的黑色海洋包围着你，武器也十分有限；更令人恐惧的是，Polydin称玩家必须「躲藏、诱敌、逃避，并从由孤儿院失踪儿童和员工化成的恐怖生物手中活下来」。真令人愉快！

paragraphs.en: You can wishlist Black Lake on Steam if you're interested.
paragraphs.cn: 如果感兴趣，你现在可以在Steam将《Black Lake》加入愿望单。

paragraphs.en: Ryan McCaffrey is IGN's executive editor of previews and host of both IGN's weekly Xbox show, Podcast Unlocked , as well as our semi-retired interview show, IGN Unfiltered . He's a North Jersey guy, so it's "Taylor ham," not "pork roll." Debate it with him on Twitter at @DMC_Ryan .
paragraphs.cn: Ryan McCaffrey是IGN预览执行编辑，同时主持IGN每周XBOX节目《Podcast Unlocked》和目前不定期更新的访谈节目《IGN Unfiltered》。他来自新泽西州北部，所以那种食物该叫「Taylor ham」，而不是「pork roll」。你可以在X上通过@DMC_Ryan和他争论。

summary: 第一人称心理与生存恐怖游戏《Black Lake》以海上漂浮的废弃孤儿院为舞台。玩家寻找失踪的双胞胎妹妹，并用手机、蜡烛和灯笼避开怪物；PC版预计2027年冬季推出。
opus_summary: 《Black Lake》把第一人称恐怖搬到海上漂浮的废弃孤儿院。玩家将追查失踪的双胞胎妹妹，依靠光源解谜并躲避由失踪儿童和员工化成的怪物。
